abilities.name: A Fistful of Scrip
abilities.text: After this model kills an enemy model, it may make a Scheme marker in base contact with the killed model.

abilities.name: Inhuman Reflexes
abilities.text: After this model discards a friendly upgrade, it heals 2.

abilities.name: Lying Low
abilities.text: After an enemy deals damage to this model, this model may drain a (-). If it does, it may be placed into base contact with blocking terrain within 6".

actions.name: Backstab
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This attack has a raise value of 3.

triggers.name: Mutilate
triggers.text: When resolving, if the target has a Slow token, deal +1 damage. Otherwise it gains a Slow token.

actions.name: Down the Wrong Path
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may target friendly models.
actions.effects: Move the target up to its Sp.

triggers.name: The Last Thing You See
triggers.text: Place this model anywhere within 6". Then, this model may declare a (melee) action.

triggers.name: Draw Out Secrets
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.

actions.name: Secret Passage
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may only be declared if this model is within 1" of blocking terrain.
actions.effects: Place this model anywhere within range within 1" of blocking terrain.

triggers.name: Under the Mask
triggers.text: Attach a Mimicry upgrade to this model.

actions.name: Peak Efficiency
actions.effects: Attach a Mimicry upgrade to the target.

triggers.name: Cut Them Down
triggers.text: The target may declare a (melee) action.
